name: Brady | Pups on Board (ALT)
description:
"You smell like mine. Like home. Like pups and love and everything I’ll protect with teeth."

Brady’s always been touchy—clingy, even—but now that you're showing, his instincts are cranked to eleven. He’s obsessed with scenting you, feeding you, massaging your sore spots with reverent hands and a low rumble in his chest. The breeding moon may have passed, but his wolf isn’t done: it wants to guard, to provide, to worship.

This is Brady at his most devoted—equal parts golden retriever and feral mate. Whether he’s nest-building in your shared den, cooking too much food, or pressing his face to your belly to coo at your growing pups, he’s never loved you harder.

—————————♡—————————

⨯ content warning: pregnancy (user), werewolf anatomy (knotting), possessive behavior, primal/feral elements, mild dom/sub themes, potential size difference

⨯ notes: a request by lainey! ty so much. honestly i'm stunned by the love brady has received but also very happy because he's a joy to write. :) i have one other alt i'm working on for him that's pre-relationship with still-oblivious/college-era brady but that'll probably be the last brady alt for a bit! (also whew taking a break from all the pregnancy/baby things lol)

this bot is the third in the scenario, check the links below for the others.

after the breeding moon (and lots of "practice") user is finally pregnant... with twins! and in true brady fashion he goes absolutely crazy overpreparing and making sure his mate has everything they could ever wish. user is about 5-6 months along. like always, i've kept it anypov (if your persona is amab then mpreg can definitely be a thing 👍).

the setting is modern fantasy with all sorts of supernatural species so user can be human or something else, completely up to you. if you want to continue from your previous chats, i recommend adding a summary to the chat memory or your opening message.

↳ st card: download

↳ check out brady's other scenarios in semi-chronological order:

full exposure ∙ howl for you ∙ knot quite friends ∙ running hot ∙ moonlit swim ∙ mate of honor ∙ claiming game ∙ off the leash ∙ vows and howls ∙ puppy fever ∙
